prompt: I want to add a Q&A to the alerts article: people keep asking whether alerts fire when a project is still in development/draft mode. The answer is no — alerts only fire once the project has been moved to production status.

assertions.text: The Q&A is added to RC-ALERT-01 (Setup article, not Management article)
assertions.check: Output file in outputs/ is named RC-ALERT-01*.md and contains the new Q&A

assertions.text: The added question is phrased as a real user would ask it (not as a policy statement)
assertions.check: The new question in the Common Questions section reads naturally, e.g. 'Will alerts fire...' or 'Do alerts send...' — not 'Alerts do not fire in development mode'

assertions.text: The answer is direct and complete — explains the behavior and why
assertions.check: The answer mentions production status requirement and optionally explains the rationale

assertions.text: The article metadata version number is incremented
assertions.check: The Version field in the metadata table changed from 1.0 to 1.1 (or higher)

assertions.text: The skill notes whether KB-REFERENCE-MAP needs updating
assertions.check: summary.txt mentions the reference map (either that it was updated or that no update was needed)
